docket_entries.description: NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO NORTH COAST TRADING CO. RETURNED, BOX CLOSED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,350.85 FILED BY ROY DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH COAST TRADING CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
INVALID SERVICE AS TO NORTH COAST TRADING CO. NO TITLE OF PARTY SERVED, NO MAILING DONE ON WHAT SHOULD HAD BEEN SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROY DIPAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH COAST TRADING CO $2,350.85 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,365.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
